programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An automatic dog potty; a tipping app; a pickup basketball simplifier; a sports gear deodorizer; a beach towel company's social efforts.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The remains of 11 female bodies are found in the desert outside of Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Authorities become suspicious when a pastor loses a second wife in an accident.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Authorities become suspicious when a pastor loses a second wife in an accident.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Jordan Belfort files a $300,000,000 lawsuit against the production company behind a film based on his life story.

programme.title: America's Next Investment
programme.desc: America's Next Investment: Exploring Opportunities in AI,Tech, Real Estate, Alcohol, Cannabis, and More. Tune in to discover how to invest!

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Senior Care Matters
programme.desc: Senior Care Matters discusses essential topics ranging from understanding Medicaid and choosing the right nursing home to maintaining health and quality of life for our senior community. Hosted by Dana Arnone RN.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: 1776 USA Pure Gold
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Flu? Urgent Care at Home with The Wellness Docs
programme.desc: Brutal flu/cold season is here. Have an urgent care and pharmacy in your home - with The Wellness Doctors.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today. With only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: High Grade 1932 Gold
programme.desc: Add the $10 1932-P Indian Head Gold Eagle PCGS MS64 to your numismatic collection today. Out of the miniscule mintage of 1932-P Indian Head Gold Eagles struck, significantly less than half of 1% have been graded Mint State 64 by PCGS and NGC.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A new age evangelist tells Florida investors that positive thinking can lead to positive returns in her auto financing business; a man steals millions to build a luxurious doomsday bunker.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A counterfeit wine dealer dominates the fine wine scene, making millions selling his cheap basement blends through elite auction houses.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A financial fraudster seeks deadly revenge after being placed behind bars for propositioning his assistant's daughter.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A mother and son score millions in the Bay Medical Clinic scam; Gigapix collects millions from would-be movie producers before being revealed as a fraud.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Doug Cassity sells fake prearranged funeral contracts, amounting to $500 million, with the help of sexy saleswomen.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Flashy former Michigan cop and corrupt real estate dealer John Bravata uses his company, nicknamed the Billionaire Boys Club, to steal $50 million from 440 middle-class investors.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A sex trafficking ring, comprised of violent pimps who exploit women, enlists a Chicago dentist to launder their money; a plot to steal a valuable comic book collection ends in murder.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Former employees, whistleblowers, and even a family friend-turned-foe provide new insights into the company's leadership and the mysterious long-term relationship between Theranos founder Elizabeth Holmes and her top deputy, Sunny Balwani.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Nine people are killed and thousands sickened when a CEO knowingly ships peanut products tainted with salmonella.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A new age evangelist tells Florida investors that positive thinking can lead to positive returns in her auto financing business; a man steals millions to build a luxurious doomsday bunker.
